top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh to Be Sworn In as Fed Chair Today
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh is set to be sworn into office as the 17th chair of the Federal Reserve, taking over at a tense moment for the economy and the central bank. Krishna Guha, Evercore ISI vice chair and head of central bank strategy, talks about how Warsh will manage monetary policy.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Microsoft’s GitHub was positioned to win the AI coding race. Outages got in the way
top_signals.summary: GitHub's user base has swelled under Microsoft's ownership, but the software repository has fallen behind newer rivals in the world of vibe coding.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mercuria Gets October UK Trial in Multibillion Dollar Hormuz Spat
top_signals.summary: Commodity trader Mercuria Energy Group Ltd. was granted an early trial over an alleged distortion to the world’s benchmark oil tanker rate that it argues is costing the company hundreds of millions of dollars.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Two Americans plead guilty to assisting India-based tech support scam centers
top_signals.summary: Adam Young, 42, and Harrison Gevirtz, 33, pleaded guilty to misprision of a felony after they were accused of offering phone numbers, call routing services, call tracking tools and call forwarding services to India-based telemarketing fraudsters.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stellantis' turnaround plan, prediction market regulation, Oura's IPO filing and more in Morning Squawk
top_signals.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

top_signals.title: XRP adds 4,300 new wallets in 24 hours, but why is price stuck?
top_signals.summary: XRP Ledger activity surges with 4,300 new wallets created in 24 hours, but strong resistance keeps XRP price capped.
